_comment: Offline OSV advisory snapshot for dependency_cve (hackathon = snapshot-only, live OSV is Phase 7). package -> [advisories]. affected: version specifiers ('*', '<x.y.z', '<=x.y.z', '==x.y.z'); any match => vulnerable.

requests.summary: Requests leaks Proxy-Authorization header on redirect.

flask.summary: Flask may cache/serve one client's session cookie to another.

pyyaml.summary: PyYAML full_load arbitrary code execution via crafted YAML.

vulnerable-demo-lib.summary: Deliberately vulnerable package used in Sentinel tests.
